scripts.build: vite build --emptyOutDir && pnpm run build:headless && pnpm run build:tests
scripts.watch: concurrently --kill-others --names app,tests "vite build --watch --mode development" "vite build --watch --mode development --config vite.config.tests.ts"
scripts.init: concurrently --kill-others --names build,serve "pnpm run watch" "pnpm run serve"
scripts.test:ci:mocked: pnpm run build:headless && MOCK_BACKEND=1 tsx ci/run-ci.ts
